category_sources: Official documentation at https://dev.opencascade.org/doc/overview/html/index.html describes OCCT for 3D surface and solid modeling, CAD/CAM/CAE.
source_facts.description: 3D modeling and numerical simulation software for CAD/CAM/CAE
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses Open CASCADE Technology and OCCT.
